blocks.text: Glimt at San Siro — Norwegian football's night of nights
Bodø/Glimt carry a stunning 3-1 lead to San Siro on Tuesday. One point in Milan completes the most extraordinary Champions League journey in Norwegian football history.

blocks.label: ⚽ CL Wednesday + Weekend Must-Watch
items: Wed 21:00 — PSG vs Monaco (PSG lead 3-2, French derby on the line)
Wed 21:00 — Real Madrid vs Benfica (narrow lead, last-16 decider)
Sat 16:15 — Barcelona vs Villarreal (La Liga title race — Barça in form after 3-0 yesterday)
Sat 16:00 — Liverpool vs West Ham (PL title race, Anfield)

blocks.text: 🎿 Thu–Sun — Biathlon World Cup Kontiolahti — Bø, Røiseland, Lægreid all in action
